title: A New Tool for Combating Human Trafficking
content: While human trafficking is mostly framed as a macro phenomenon, this does not fully explain how these criminal networks operate. Recognizing that trafficking corridors link specific source and destination localities offers a stronger basis for policy than a purely national approach or isolated interventions.

creator: Kevin Hyland
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly in Global Tax Negotiations
content: Ongoing negotiations at the United Nations offer the international community the best chance that it will have to ensure that global taxation authority is assigned fairly. With multinationals and the ultra-rich abusing the current system to minimize their tax payments, finalizing a new convention is an urgent priority.

creator: José Antonio Ocampo
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Case for Banning Anti-Democratic Parties
content: The history of the 20th century shows that democracies sometimes must pursue seemingly undemocratic measures against those whose pursuit of power is motivated by a desire to abolish democracy altogether. Arguments that such a response is self-defeating do not withstand scrutiny.
snippet: The history of the 20th century shows that democracies sometimes must pursue seemingly undemocratic measures against those whose pursuit of power is motivated by a desire to abolish democracy
creator: Jan-Werner Mueller
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Bayer Truth About Trump’s Farm and Food Policies
content: A new executive order on regenerative agriculture might seem to suggest that US President Donald Trump’s administration wants to help American farmers. But a closer look at the order and other recent developments reveals a familiar pattern: an unhappy public gets reassuring words, while corporate interests receive tangible support.
snippet: A new executive order on regenerative agriculture might seem to suggest that US President Donald Trump’s administration wants to help American farmers. But a closer look at the order and other recent
creator: Christopher Marquis
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Don’t Overestimate America and China’s Importance
content: Some commentators on international affairs seem to think that “the West” and the BRICS+ do not really matter; only the United States and China do. Yet three factors complicate this simplistic framing, suggesting that even superpowers' influence has limits, and that smaller powers can sometimes punch above their weight.
snippet: Some commentators on international affairs seem to think that “the West” and the BRICS+ do not really matter; only the United States and China do. Yet three factors complicate this simplistic framing,
creator: Jim O'Neill
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Colombia’s Rightward Turn
content: There is a growing tension in Colombia between the popular demand for a strong welfare state and a political system that cannot deliver on that promise unless it breaks free from malign influences. Since the incoming administration is aligned with many of those interests, Colombians will continue to be disappointed.
snippet: There is a growing tension in Colombia between the popular demand for a strong welfare state and a political system that cannot deliver on that promise unless it breaks free from malign influences.
creator: Luis Carlos Reyes
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: A Cold War Adventure in Portugal
content: Just 52 years after escaping military dictatorship, Portugal is an EU and eurozone member and the world’s seventh-safest country. While Donald Trump's systematic destruction of the rules-based global order will not reverse this progress, nor will it do any good for Portugal, the US, or anyone else.
snippet: Just 52 years after escaping military dictatorship, Portugal is an EU and eurozone member and the world’s seventh-safest country. While Donald Trump's systematic destruction of the rules-based global
creator: Jeffrey Frankel
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Social-Media Age Bans Won’t Make Children Safer—But This Will
content: As the European Union considers how to protect and empower young people in a digital world, it must resist the urge only to enact a ban on social media for young people. A more effective strategy would force tech companies to remove addictive features by holding them to product-liability standards—as with most other industries.

creator: Kelly Stonelake
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Who Will Sit Atop the Next World Order?
content: American hegemony has given way to a global order based on rivalry and competition among several major powers, where there is no longer a fixed, codified set of rules. Instead, there is only economic, technological, and military power—the likes of which China is amassing faster than many observers realize.
snippet: American hegemony has given way to a global order based on rivalry and competition among several major powers, where there is no longer a fixed, codified set of rules. Instead, there is only economic,
creator: Joschka Fischer
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: AI Will Supercharge Surveillance Capitalism
content: For too long, governments have stood by and allowed the creation of business models built on the commercial exploitation of users' personal data and that reward social and psychological manipulation. With the AI industry poised to replicate this model, policymakers must intervene before it is too late.
snippet: For too long, governments have stood by and allowed the creation of business models built on the commercial exploitation of users' personal data and that reward social and psychological manipulation.
creator: Courtney C. Radsch
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: An Alternative History for America at 250
content: Commemorating the 250th anniversary of the United States requires an honest appraisal of not only its founding principles but also its racist and imperialist legacy. A clear-eyed assessment shows why many people in the Global South remain cynical about the country’s ability to live up to its ideals.
snippet: Commemorating the 250th anniversary of the United States requires an honest appraisal of not only its founding principles but also its racist and imperialist legacy. A clear-eyed assessment shows why
creator: Adekeye Adebajo
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: A Turning Point for African Industrialization
content: Building on the success of his mega-refinery in Lagos, Nigerian industrialist Aliko Dangote is in talks to construct a second one in collaboration with several East African countries. African leaders should learn from Dangote’s strategy of adding value to the continent’s natural resources and fostering cross-border cooperation.

creator: Koffi Alle
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Subsidies Do Not Explain China’s Competitiveness
content: Like every major economy, China uses industrial policy, and its subsidies have mattered. But subsidies are no longer the most convincing explanation for Chinese firms’ emergence as global leaders in industries that used to be the exclusive domain of advanced economies.
snippet: Like every major economy, China uses industrial policy, and its subsidies have mattered. But subsidies are no longer the most convincing explanation for Chinese firms’ emergence as global leaders in
creator: Kai Guo
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Putin Likes His Worst Option in Ukraine
content: Faced with a quagmire in eastern Ukraine and escalating Ukrainian attacks within Russia, Vladimir Putin must either seek a ceasefire or pursue some form of escalation. With all signs pointing to him embracing the latter alternative, the situation could worsen dramatically for everyone, but especially for him.

creator: Carl Bildt
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Subversion of the International Criminal Court
content: Already under US sanctions for his role in securing an arrest warrant for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, the chief prosecutor of the International Criminal Court is now at risk of being removed altogether. If member states do not stand up for judicial independence now, they may never get another chance.
snippet: Already under US sanctions for his role in securing an arrest warrant for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, the chief prosecutor of the International Criminal Court is now at risk of being
creator: Josep Borrell
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: What Inequality Does to Electoral Democracy
content: Like many advanced democracies, France has long cycled between periods in which its politics were divided along traditional left-right redistributionist lines, and those in which culture war issues took center stage. If there is any lesson to be drawn from this history, it is that the cycle may be about to repeat.
snippet: Like many advanced democracies, France has long cycled between periods in which its politics were divided along traditional left-right redistributionist lines, and those in which culture war issues
creator: Harold James
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Where Will Global Financial Fragmentation Lead?
content: Debates about geopolitical fragmentation always revive the late economist Robert Mundell’s dream of a single world money. But participants should be mindful of the euro’s real-world experience over the past quarter-century.
snippet: Debates about geopolitical fragmentation always revive the late economist Robert Mundell’s dream of a single world money. But participants should be mindful of the euro’s real-world experience over
creator: Şebnem   Kalemli-Özcan
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Development Economics for an Age of Upheaval
content: The framework that has long guided development economics no longer reflects how modern economies actually create value. As the boundaries that once separated sectors become blurred, prosperity increasingly depends on how economies build the ecosystems that sustain technological progress and nurture new productive capacity.
snippet: The framework that has long guided development economics no longer reflects how modern economies actually create value. As the boundaries that once separated sectors become blurred, prosperity
creator: Carlos Lopes
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Death of the Degree
content: AI is often portrayed as a threat to higher education, with some administrators and professors focused on rooting out its use. But this approach fails to recognize that, in an AI-transformed world, the new dividing lines are technical capabilities and institutional pipelines that can quickly transform research into products.

creator: Iryna Volnytska
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Hungary’s Real Economic Test
content: Entering the euro with favorable market sentiment, but without an economy that can function well within a monetary union, would not serve Hungary’s long-term interests. It would be a formula for more broken promises—precisely the trend that the new government was elected to end.
